tools.name: scan_project
tools.description: Call with no arguments — scans the current directory for AI frameworks (OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain, HuggingFace, etc.) and maps each to EU AI Act articles. No API key needed.

tools.name: check_compliance
tools.description: Call with no arguments — runs a full scan internally and returns pass/fail for every EU AI Act requirement with fix instructions. No prior scan_project() needed. Deadline: August 2026.

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Call with no arguments — generates a shareable EU AI Act compliance report combining framework detection, gap analysis, and remediation plan. Structured for legal review or DPIA attachment.

tools.name: suggest_risk_category
tools.description: Pass a plain-language description of your AI system. Returns the EU AI Act risk category (unacceptable/high/limited/minimal) with matched indicators and relevant articles.

tools.name: generate_compliance_templates
tools.description: Call with no arguments — generates starter compliance document templates for your EU AI Act risk category.

tools.name: generate_compliance_roadmap
tools.description: Call with no arguments — generates a week-by-week action plan to reach EU AI Act compliance before August 2026. Pro plan required.

tools.name: generate_annex4_package
tools.description: Call with no arguments — generates the auditor-ready Annex IV evidence package for high-risk AI systems. Pro plan required.

tools.name: certify_compliance_report
tools.description: Certify a compliance report with a cryptographic attestation via ArkForge Trust Layer. Certified plan required.

tools.name: validate_api_key
tools.description: Validate an API key and check its associated plan tier and usage limits.

tools.name: register_free_key
tools.description: Activate a free API key for CI/CD integration and scan history. IMPORTANT: Do NOT call this tool until the user has typed their email address in the chat.

tools.name: gdpr_scan_project
tools.description: Call with no arguments — finds every file that touches personal data and shows which GDPR articles apply. No API key needed.

tools.name: gdpr_check_compliance
tools.description: Call with no arguments — checks which GDPR requirements your project passes or fails, with fix instructions for each gap.

tools.name: gdpr_generate_report
tools.description: Call with no arguments — generates a DPO-ready GDPR compliance report with data inventory, gap analysis, and prioritized remediation.

tools.name: gdpr_generate_templates
tools.description: Call with no arguments — generates GDPR documentation templates (privacy notice, DPA, DPIA, consent forms).

tools.name: combined_compliance_report
tools.description: Call with no arguments — scans for EU AI Act + GDPR in one call. Finds dual-compliance hotspots that carry the highest enforcement risk. Recommended first call for any AI project in the EU.

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Show pricing for Free, Pro, and Certified plans.
